    addGroupable(GroupablePoint) - Method in class com.amazingco.PickingPointHub

    Adds an identifier to the list of authorized IDs for this package.
    addPackage(Package, LocalDate) - Method in class com.amazingco.GroupablePoint
    Adds the given package to the container with an associated deadline date.

    Adds a package to the kiosk with the provided expiry date.
    addPackage(Package, LocalDate) - Method in class com.amazingco.PackageLocker
    Adds a package to this package locker with the provided expiry date.
    addPackage(Package, LocalDate) - Method in class com.amazingco.PostOffice

    Adds a picking point to the system.

    C

    collectPackageAsCashOnDelivery(Package) - Method in class com.amazingco.PostOffice
    Processes a cash-on-delivery pickup: marks the package as paid and picked up, updates collected amount and removes it from storage.

    getCapacity() - Method in class com.amazingco.GroupablePoint
    Returns the capacity of this container.
    getCollectedAmount() - Method in class com.amazingco.Kiosk
    Returns the accumulated collected amount for this kiosk.
    getCollectedAmount() - Method in class com.amazingco.PostOffice
    Returns the amount collected by this PostOffice.
    getCoordinates() - Method in class com.amazingco.PickingPoint
    Returns the GPS coordinates of this picking point.
    getEligiblePickingPoints(GPSCoordinate, Double, Package) - Method in class com.amazingco.PickingPointsSystem
    Returns picking points within the radius that are eligible for the given package according to its type and payment status.
    getEmptyLockers() - Method in class com.amazingco.PackageLocker
    Returns the number of empty lockers.
    getGroupableCount() - Method in class com.amazingco.PickingPointHub
    Returns the number of elements in the hub.
    getGroupables() - Method in class com.amazingco.PickingPointHub
    Returns the elements belonging to this hub.
    getIdentifications() - Method in class com.amazingco.Package
    Returns the list of identifiers authorized to pick up this package at a PostOffice.
    getIdentifier() - Method in class com.amazingco.PickingPoint
    Returns the identifier of this picking point.
    getNearbyPickingPoints(GPSCoordinate, Double) - Method in class com.amazingco.PickingPointsSystem
    Returns picking points within the given radius of the provided GPS coordinate.
    getOccupiedLockers() - Method in class com.amazingco.PackageLocker
    Returns the number of occupied lockers.
    getOpeningTime() - Method in class com.amazingco.PickingPoint
    Returns the opening time of this picking point.
    getOperativePickingPoints() - Method in class com.amazingco.PickingPointsSystem
    Returns a list of all operative picking points.
    getOutOfServicePickingPoints() - Method in class com.amazingco.PickingPointsSystem

    getPackageCode() - Method in class com.amazingco.Package

    Returns the package stored in the container linked to the provided package code.

    Returns the package stored in the kiosk matching the provided code.
    getPackageInLocker(String) - Method in class com.amazingco.PackageLocker
    Returns the package stored in the locker matching the provided code.

    Returns the registered package for the given code.
    getPackageRegistered(String) - Method in class com.amazingco.PostOffice
    Returns the registered package matching the provided package code.
    getPickingPointsWithAvailableSpace() - Method in class com.amazingco.PickingPointsSystem
    Returns picking points that currently have free space.
    getPickupDateFor(String) - Method in interface com.amazingco.IdentificationRegistry
    Returns the pickup date for the given package code.
    getPickupDateFor(String) - Method in class com.amazingco.PostOffice
    Returns the stored pickup date for the registered package matching the provided package code.
    getPrice() - Method in class com.amazingco.Package
    Returns the package price.

    Returns the identifier (e.g.
    getRegisteredIdFor(String) - Method in class com.amazingco.PostOffice
    Returns the registered identifier (first authorized ID) for the given package code.

    Returns the storage end date for this package.

    Returns whether this package locker is eligible for a given package.

    isOperative() - Method in class com.amazingco.PickingPoint
    Returns whether this picking point is operative.
    isOverdue(LocalDate) - Method in class com.amazingco.Package
    Returns whether the package has exceeded its storage deadline compared to the provided date.

    Check whether a pickup for the given package code has been registered.
    isPackagePickupRegistered(String) - Method in class com.amazingco.PostOffice
    Returns whether a pickup has been registered for the given package code.
    isPaid() - Method in class com.amazingco.Package
    Returns whether the package has been paid.
    isPickedUp() - Method in class com.amazingco.Package
    Returns whether the package has been picked up.
    isReturned() - Method in class com.amazingco.Package
    Returns whether the package has been returned.

    Checks whether there is available space in the kiosk.
    isSpaceAvailable() - Method in class com.amazingco.PackageLocker
    Returns true if there is available space, false otherwise.
    isSpaceAvailable() - Method in class com.amazingco.PickingPoint
    Returns whether there is available space at this picking point.

    Returns whether any grouped element has available space.

    Performs the payment to AmazingCo by resetting the collected amount to zero.

    R

    registerCertifiedPackagePickup(Package, String, LocalDate) - Method in interface com.amazingco.IdentificationRegistry
    Register the certified pickup of a package.
    registerCertifiedPackagePickup(Package, String, LocalDate) - Method in class com.amazingco.PostOffice
    Registers the pickup of a certified package at this PostOffice.
    removeGroupable(GroupablePoint) - Method in class com.amazingco.PickingPointHub
    Removes a groupable element from this hub.
    removePackage(String, LocalDate) - Method in class com.amazingco.GroupablePoint
    Removes a package from this groupable point according to the provided package code and deadline date when it should be returned to the central office.
    removePackage(String, LocalDate) - Method in class com.amazingco.Kiosk
    Removes a package identified by its code, using the provided current date to determine overdue or return behavior.
    removePackage(String, LocalDate) - Method in class com.amazingco.PackageLocker
    Removes the package identified by the given code, using the provided current date to determine overdue or return behavior.
    removePickingPoint(String) - Method in class com.amazingco.PickingPointsSystem
    Removes a picking point identified by the given identifier.
